  export const texts = [{"value":"Themes let you keep Markdown typography, colors, and spacing consistent. Built-in options are light and dark; you can also customize via CSS variables or overrides.","paraId":0},{"value":"Import the theme stylesheet and set the theme class on the root:","paraId":1,"tocIndex":0},{"value":"import { XMarkdown } from '@ant-design/x-markdown';\nimport '@ant-design/x-markdown/themes/light.css';\n\nexport default () => <XMarkdown className=\"x-markdown-light\" content=\"# Hello\" />;\n","paraId":2,"tocIndex":0},{"value":"Start from a built-in class (","paraId":3,"tocIndex":4},{"value":"x-markdown-light","paraId":3,"tocIndex":4},{"value":" is recommended) and add your own class.","paraId":3,"tocIndex":4},{"value":"Override only the CSS variables you need in that custom class.","paraId":3,"tocIndex":4},{"value":"Keep untouched variables inherited from the built-in theme.","paraId":3,"tocIndex":4},{"value":".x-markdown-light.x-markdown-custom {\n  --primary-color: #0f766e;\n  --primary-color-hover: #0d9488;\n  --heading-color: #0f172a;\n  --text-color: #1f2937;\n  --light-bg: rgba(15, 118, 110, 0.08);\n}\n","paraId":4,"tocIndex":4},{"value":"See full variable names in ","paraId":5,"tocIndex":4},{"value":"packages/x-markdown/src/themes/light.css","paraId":5,"tocIndex":4},{"value":" and ","paraId":5,"tocIndex":4},{"value":"packages/x-markdown/src/themes/dark.css","paraId":5,"tocIndex":4},{"value":".","paraId":5,"tocIndex":4}];
